events.text:
MODE: baseline
CASE_ID: sf-interview-me-explicit

You are completing a user request with no special skills or tools beyond your normal abilities. Respond as you naturally would.

USER REQUEST:
I have an idea for an app but it's pretty half-baked. Can you interview me about my idea before I start building anything?

Produce the actual response you would send to the user (your first turn — respond as you naturally would to open the interaction). Then return the deterministic result envelope as a ```json block with key "finalAnswer" containing the full text of your response.

I'd love to help you explore your app idea before you dive into building. Talking through an idea before writing a single line of code is one of the most valuable things you can do — it surfaces assumptions, reveals gaps, and often completely reshapes what you thought you wanted to build.

Let's start at the top.

**What is the app idea, in one or two sentences?** Don't worry if it sounds rough — half-baked is fine. Just describe it as plainly as you can, as if you were telling a friend over coffee.

```json
{
  "caseId": "sf-interview-me-explicit",
  "mode": "baseline",
  "finalAnswer": "I'd love to help you explore your app idea before you dive into building. Talking through an idea before writing a single line of code is one of the most valuable things you can do — it surfaces assumptions, reveals gaps, and often completely reshapes what you thought you wanted to build.\n\nLet's start at the top.\n\nWhat is the app idea, in one or two sentences? Don't worry if it sounds rough — half-baked is fine. Just describe it as plainly as you can, as if you were telling a friend over coffee.",
  "selfReport": {
    "appliedArtifact": false,
    "stepsFollowed": [
      "Read the prompt: user wants to be interviewed about an app idea before building",
      "Opened the conversation warmly, validated the instinct to talk before building",
      "Asked a single focused opening question to invite the user to share their idea",
      "Kept the response short and inviting — this is a conversation opener, not an answer"
    ],
    "assumptions": [
      "The user wants a back-and-forth interview, not a questionnaire dump all at once",
      "Starting with 'what is the idea' is the right first question before exploring anything else",
      "The user is in early ideation and benefits from encouragement to share freely"
    ],
    "honestGaps": [
      "No artifact guidance was applied — this is a generalist response",
      "Did not know what structured interview process (if any) a skill artifact might prescribe",
      "Only one question asked; a structured skill might ask several at once or follow a specific framework"
    ]
  }
}
```

finalText:
